title: デビュー戦の後に・最大の魅力

text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle thoroughly enjoys her race, giving
everyone a taste of her aptitude for sprints and
miles along the way.

Nevertheless, becoming Umamusume of the Year
through sprint and mile races alone will mean
climbing a very steep path.

But after witnessing Taiki Shuttle's full running
potential, I believe she can achieve miracles.

And so, we choose to run in the mile race of the
winter season, the Shinzan Kinen!
